item.title: A Trip to Western New York (2021.03)
item.description: A Trip to Western New York (2021.03) Cornell University Official Website. A outstanding university with a huge campus and extraordinary studying atmosphere. Corning Museum of Glass Official Website. A very interesting museum to visit. 5-star recommendation, even you are not a glass nerd. Niagara Fall Location. I wasn’t able to try the Cave of the Winds this time. I want to visit it again after the pandemic.
